---
title: "axis_complement"
generated: true
description: "Return the complement of the axis or axes for a tensor of dimension ndim."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:axis_complement -->
```python
axis_complement(ndim: int, axis: Union[int, Sequence[int]]) -> Tuple[int, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:axis_complement -->
Return the complement of the axis or axes for a tensor of dimension ndim.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:axis_complement -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `ndim` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `axis` | `Union[int, Sequence[int]]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[int, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
